title: Hopscotch International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hopscotch International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Hopscotch International Enterprises:
Hopscotch International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch International Enterprises!
